name: Hetzner Object Storage
description: Hetzner Object Storage — S3-compatible blob store hosted in Hetzner's German + Finnish data centres. Standard AWS SigV4 signing against <region>.your-objectstorage.com. Three regions: fsn1 (Falkenstein, DE), nbg1 (Nuremberg, DE), hel1 (Helsinki, FI). Free egress within Hetzner's eu-central network zone — useful when paired with a Hetzner Cloud server in the same region. Generate access keys at console.hetzner.cloud → Project → Object Storage → Access keys.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Region
credential_fields.description: Data centre location. fsn1 = Falkenstein (Germany), nbg1 = Nuremberg (Germany), hel1 = Helsinki (Finland). Pick the region nearest your users / your Hetzner Cloud servers — egress within the same eu-central network zone is free.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: Access Key ID
credential_fields.description: From console.hetzner.cloud → your project → Object Storage → Access keys → Create access key. Shown once on creation. Scope to the buckets the install will use.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: Secret Access Key
credential_fields.description: Paired secret returned alongside the access key. Shown once; if lost, generate a fresh key.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a bucket (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass the object content as the 'body' input — the runner sends it verbatim with SigV4-signed integrity hash. Hetzner caps single-PUT uploads at 5 GB; the integration runner caps responses at 200 MB so use multipart for very large objects (or upload via the storage app's S3 backend, which already chunks at 32 MB part size by default).

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200 MB).

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204 on success.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all buckets in this Hetzner Object Storage account for the configured region. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] carries the names + creation dates.
